summary: Iteration 39 frontend testing completed successfully. Verified all design/UX updates: professional black-gold-white-blue theme renders correctly; desktop nav uses direct links (no dropdowns); FastScrollTop floating button appears after scrolling and returns user to top; iOS-safe image classes applied; How It Works and Appeal Statistics headings are centered; all navigation routes work without regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: FastScrollTop.jsx: Button correctly appears at scrollY > 420px with data-testid='global-fast-scroll-top-btn', uses smooth scroll behavior
LandingPage.jsx: Desktop nav (lines 46-64) has direct Link components with data-testid attributes - no dropdown menus
index.css (lines 217-229): iOS-safe image classes properly defined with @supports for WebKit touch
Images in LandingPage use 'object-contain sm:object-cover ios-image-safe image-safe' classes for cross-platform rendering
HowItWorksPage.jsx and AppealStatisticsPage.jsx: Section headings have 'text-center' class for proper alignment
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 verified all visual/UX redesign changes. Key findings: 1) FastScrollTop component works - button appears after scrolling 420px and returns to top with smooth scroll; 2) Landing desktop nav uses 6 direct links (See It In Action, Appeal Statistics, Legal Resources, Success Stories, FAQ, About) - no dropdown dependencies; 3) 7+ images have ios-image-safe class for iOS rendering; 4) How It Works page has centered headings (Process Flow, See It In Action, Report Prices); 5) Appeal Statistics page has centered section headings and access crisis content expanded by default; 6) All nav links navigate correctly. Note: Playwright force=True clicks don't trigger React onClick handlers properly - use page.evaluate for JS clicks if needed.

landing_page_load.details: Landing page loads with header, hero section, professional design

ios_safe_images.details: 7 images found with ios-image-safe and object-contain classes

fast_scroll_top_button.hidden_initially: PASS - Button not in DOM before scrolling (conditional render)
fast_scroll_top_button.visible_after_scroll: PASS - Button appears after scrolling 420+ pixels
fast_scroll_top_button.returns_to_top: PASS - Clicking button scrolls page to position 0
